remarks: Beautifully updated 1-bedroom unit in the highly desirable Northill complex in Springdale, just a 5-minute walk to the train station. This bright and spacious unit features a large living and dining area with classic parquet flooring. The updated kitchen offers granite countertops and stainless steel appliances, while the generously sized bedroom provides ample comfort and storage. The renovated bathroom showcases marble flooring and porcelain finishes. The building's main lobby and hallways have been recently renovated, adding to the property's appeal. Residents enjoy access to an on-site fitness center, laundry facilities on every floor, and one assigned parking space (#3). The HOA includes heat, hot water, and cooking gas. Conveniently located within walking distance to shops, restaurants, grocery stores, and public transportation, this is an exceptional opportunity to enjoy comfortable living in a prime location.
